verified.name: JokeAPI
verified.tagline: Programming, dark, and pun jokes with per-flag filtering
verified.description: Pulls jokes from categories like Programming, Pun, Misc, and Dark, delivered as a single line or a setup-and-delivery pair. Every response carries safety flags (nsfw, political, racist, sexist, explicit) so you can screen what reaches users, and you can blacklist flags, pick a format, or choose a language.

sampleJson.joke:
A programmer puts two glasses on his bedside table before going to sleep.
A full one, in case he gets thirsty, and an empty one, in case he doesn't.

verified.name: TCGdex
verified.tagline: Pokémon TCG set and card data in many languages
verified.description: Browse Pokémon Trading Card Game sets and their cards, each with an ID, local number, name, and a hosted card image URL. Set responses include a card-count breakdown (holo, first-edition, reverse, total). Reads are keyless and data is offered across multiple languages.

verified.name: bng2latlong
verified.tagline: Convert British National Grid coords to lat/long
verified.description: Turns OSGB36 British National Grid coordinates (easting, northing) into WGS84 decimal latitude and longitude, returned as a compact JSON object with a status flag. Part of GetTheData's set of free UK reference-data services. No key or POST body needed.

verified.name: Open Government, Portugal
verified.tagline: Portugal's national open-data catalog as paginated JSON
verified.description: The API behind Portugal's official open-data portal, listing datasets with metadata such as access type, description, timestamps, badges, and contact points. Responses are paginated JSON so you can crawl the whole catalog. Built on the udata platform and keyless for reads.

data.description: Este conjunto de dados integra os Conjuntos de Dados de Elevado Valor/HVD identificados de acordo com o Regulamento de Execução n.º 2023/138 …

verified.name: Helium
verified.tagline: Media-bias news scoring and AI market forecasts
verified.description: Serves financial news search with source-bias scoring and balanced synthesis, plus AI-generated market data such as ticker forecasts with bullish and bearish cases and probability-weighted outcomes. The first fifty queries per IP need no key. Endpoints are shaped for MCP-style agent tooling.

sampleJson.name: Apple
sampleJson.bullish_case: Near-term upside is plausible if WWDC catalysts land and Helium's AI forecast stays constructive …
sampleJson.bearish_case: AAPL stalls on WWDC or faces macro headwinds, triggering a pullback toward 295–305 …

verified.freeTier: First 50 queries per IP free, no key (paid API key beyond, ~$0.02/query)
